title: Missing-person last-known-point record
summary: Record full description, clothing, photo, medical or mobility needs, exact last-known place and time, planned route, contacts, and who verified each fact.
content: Record full description, clothing, photo, medical or mobility needs, exact last-known place and time, planned route, contacts, and who verified each fact. Contact emergency authorities promptly and preserve messages, tracks, and belongings that may help trained search teams. Do not send untrained people into dangerous terrain or contaminate the last-known area.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Missing-person last-known-point record”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Missing-person last-known-point record»
steps: Record full description, clothing, photo, medical or mobility needs, exact last-known place and time, planned route, contacts, and who verified each fact.
Contact emergency authorities promptly and preserve messages, tracks, and belongings that may help trained search teams.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Missing-person last-known-point record.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Missing-person last-known-point record.
warnings: Do not send untrained people into dangerous terrain or contaminate the last-known area.

common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Missing-person last-known-point record.

when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Missing-person last-known-point record.
short_term: For Missing-person last-known-point record, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Missing-person last-known-point record, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Missing-person last-known-point record, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Missing-person last-known-point record to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
